mano_cua.result_summary: Bobarr 是媒体管理工具，需要 Docker Compose 运行多个后端服务（PostgreSQL, Redis, Jackett, qBittorrent 等）。git clone 超时（网络不稳定）。即使能 clone，也无法在本机独立运行前端。backend_risk 预期。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Bobarr is a media management tool requiring Docker Compose with multiple backend services (PostgreSQL, Redis, Jackett, qBittorrent). Git clone timed out. Even if cloned, cannot run frontend standalone. backend_risk as expected.
